visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a middle-aged man in a studio setting, wearing a gray sweatshirt with 'ROOTS' text, round glasses, and a distinctive red and gray plaid flat cap. He speaks energetically toward the camera, using frequent hand gestures. The background is a simple gray studio wall with brand logos in the upper corners. (2) A large graphic icon for the 'Lookus' app, featuring a green smiling heart on a black square, appears in the center of the frame. The man gestures toward the icon while continuing his explanation. (3) There is a brief cutaway to a woman with long brown hair standing outdoors in front of a modern glass building. She is looking at her smartphone screen. The lighting is natural daylight, and the background is slightly blurred. (4) The scene returns to the man in the studio. Several colorful, bold text boxes with questions about app features pop up around him. He remains the central focus, maintaining high energy and direct eye contact with the lens. (5) The man points his finger directly at the camera while laughing during a final humorous exchange. His body posture is relaxed, and he leans slightly forward to emphasize his point before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 超狂抓猴-APP-. [Logo]: 3c 有意思tim哥 @3ctim miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 媲美國軍監控系統. (3) [Subtitle]: 近期有網友分享一款. (4) [Subtitle]: 名為「Lookus」的APP. (5) [Slogan]: Lookus - 情侶定位 實時自動報備位置共享查找 APP. (6) [Subtitle]: 目前只有蘋果用戶能使用. (7) [Subtitle]: 例如女友在使用手機的過程中. (8) [Subtitle]: 就會跳出通知說. (9) [Subtitle]: 你另一半正在使用手機的過程. (10) [Variety]: 解鎖手機幾次?. (11) [Variety]: 手機螢幕使用時間多長?. (12) [Variety]: 移動並停留到哪些地方?. (13) [Variety]: 搜尋敏感內容次數?. (14) [Subtitle]: 而這款 APP 不需要後台. (15) [Subtitle]: 也能將你的位置. (16) [Subtitle]: 很精準的傳達給另一半. (17) [Subtitle]: 即使你手機有調到靜音. (18) [Subtitle]: 依然也可以收到. (19) [Subtitle]: 它的緊急訊息的通知聲音. (20) [Subtitle]: 導演我幫你裝. (21) [Subtitle]: 我抓你. (22) [Subtitle]: 我跟你又不是情侶. (23) [Variety]: ㄎㄅ喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male speaker in studio, 1 female character in cutaway scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing round glasses, a plaid flat cap, and a gray sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a neutral gray studio wall with some logos; the secondary background is an urban street with a glass-fronted building.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male speaker delivering a high-energy, fast-paced narration. An upbeat electronic background track with a strong 4/4 beat and bright synth chords starts simultaneously. The speaker's voice is clear and projected, suggesting a professional studio recording environment with minimal noise. (2) A distinctive digital 'whoosh' sound effect occurs as a graphic appears, marking a transition in the instructional content. The speaker maintains his enthusiastic tone while describing the app's features. The BGM remains constant in volume and tempo throughout this section. (3) A subtle 'pop' sound effect is heard when variety-style text bubbles appear on the screen. The speaker's delivery remains fluid with very few pauses, creating a sense of urgency and information density. The background music provides a rhythmic bed that supports the speech. (4) As the narration moves into a hypothetical scenario, the speaker's vocal inflection becomes slightly more inquisitive and playful. The acoustics remain very dry and controlled, characteristic of a well-treated studio space. No external ambient sounds or incidental noises are heard. (5) The video concludes with a casual, humorous dialogue exchange. The speaker's tone becomes teasing and informal, accompanied by a brief sound of laughter. The music and speech both end abruptly with a hard cut at the final frame.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Overview -> Scenario Example -> Humorous Interaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional showcase and quick tutorial for a mobile application named 'Lookus', designed for couples to track each other's phone usage and location. The creator uses a high-energy, humorous persona to engage the audience while detailing the app's invasive monitoring capabilities.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly names the app 'Lookus', shows its logo, and describes its specific features in detail as the core subject of the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social media content with typical variety-show editing and upbeat pacing.
